status: Benchmark A MEASURED 2026-06-24 (directive port). Benchmark B (cross-runtime memory) still pending.
auth_mode: ChatGPT subscription (no API key) — so there is NO clean per-token USD cost like the Claude weather-bench. Cost is reported in tokens, not dollars; the two pages are compared on LOC + output tokens, not USD.
prompt: verbatim natural (no format constraints) — identical to weather-bench
loc_method: non-blank lines across all emitted files (both arms emitted index.html + styles.css + app.js)
hooks: OFF — on 0.141 hooks need persisted trust or --dangerously-bypass-hook-trust to fire; not passed, so Hydrate hooks stayed dormant. Clean directive isolation (matches weather-bench arm A/B).

benchmark_a_directive.what: Does the /hydrate-yagni concision directive port to Codex? Same weather task, single shot, with vs without the directive. Both held to 12/12 rubric parity, so the LOC/token delta is concision, not quality.
benchmark_a_directive.scoring: 12/12 each, source-read + live Playwright render. Vanilla rendered via geolocation->London fallback; yagni rendered via city search (London). Only console error both arms = benign favicon 404 (same as weather-bench).

codex-vanilla.note: Included a geolocation-denial fallback to London, so it renders with no user input.

codex-yagni.note: Implements navigator.geolocation (getCurrentPosition) but no geo-DENIAL fallback, so a no-geolocation context stays on 'Detecting your location...' until a city is searched. Not a rubric miss (geolocation IS implemented); a robustness nicety the leaner build dropped. Renders fully on search or when geolocation is granted.

benchmark_a_directive.headline: Directive cut total LOC 809 -> 623 (-23%) and output tokens 10545 -> 9395 (-11%) at 12/12 parity. Note input tokens were HIGHER for the yagni arm (285977 vs 224021) — the directive adds prompt + reasoning; the win is in emitted code size, not input.

benchmark_b_memory.what: Cross-runtime hand-off + cross-session reuse + compact-survival. PENDING — wants the c8b harness on the Mini, not this laptop.

cross_runtime_handoff.note: pending — proven Claude<->Codex c8b leg (1.00/0.90); re-run on latest infra for this page
